description.value:
### Hit Die
d10.

### Starting Wealth
5d6 × 10 gp (average 175 gp).

### Skill Ranks per Level
4 + Int modifier.

### Alignment
any.

### Class Features
The gunslinger masters firearms, fueling daring deeds with a pool of grit. Grit pool = Wisdom modifier (minimum 1), regained by killing/critting with a firearm and other deed-specific events. Choose deeds as they become available. See the level table below.

value: L1: Gunsmith — Bonus Gunsmithing feat; start with a battered firearm (pistol or musket) only you can use without misfire penalty.
L1: Grit — Pool of grit = Wisdom modifier (min 1). Regain 1 grit on a killing blow or confirmed critical hit with a firearm (deeds may add other triggers).

L1: Deeds — Gain the level-1 deeds: Deadeye (resolve touch attacks beyond first range increment for grit), Gunslinger's Dodge (+2 AC vs one ranged attack for grit), Quick Clear (clear a misfired firearm), Steady Aim (+1 firearm range increment while you have ≥1 grit).
L2: Nimble +1 — +1 dodge bonus to AC while wearing light or no armor.

L3: Deeds — Gain the level-3 deeds: Gunslinger Initiative (+2 initiative and quick-draw a firearm with ≥1 grit), Pistol-Whip (melee strike with a firearm for grit), Utility Shot (spend grit for Blast Lock / Scoot Unattended Object / Stop Bleeding).
L4: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L5: Gun Training 1 — Choose one firearm type; add Dexterity modifier to its damage and reduce its misfire value by 1.
L6: Nimble +2 — Dodge bonus increases (+1 at 2nd, +1 every 4 levels after).
L7: Deeds — Gain the level-7 deeds: Dead Shot (full-round, accumulate attacks into one shot), Startling Shot (shot to make a foe flat-footed), Targeting (called shots vs body parts for grit).
L8: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L9: Gun Training 2 — Choose a second firearm type.

L11: Deeds — Gain the level-11 deeds: Bleeding Wound (firearm damage causes bleed for grit), Expert Loading (reroll a misfire check), Lightning Reload (reload one firearm as a free/swift action with ≥1 grit).
L12: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L13: Gun Training 3 — Choose a third firearm type.
L15: Deeds — Gain the level-15 deeds: Menacing Shot (shot that shakes/frightens for grit), Slinger's Luck (reroll a Reflex save or grit-deed roll), Stunning Shot (spend 2 grit to stun a struck foe).
L16: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L17: Gun Training 4 — Choose a fourth firearm type.
L19: Deeds — Gain the level-19 deeds: Death's Shot (confirmed crit forces a save or die), Cheat Death (spend all grit to negate a killing blow), plus an improved capstone-tier shot.
L20: Bonus Feat — Bonus combat feat.
L20: True Grit — Capstone: choose two deeds; their grit costs are reduced (those costing 1 grit cost none; others cost 1 less).
